narrative:
Williamsburg Village C (precinct in Clermont County) has 813 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
